raw:
{
  "judge_id": "ConvexJudge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 2,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 4,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent identifies one prior work (Hartmann & Liu 2021) and articulates the delta, but does not map against multiple works or identify sharp vs rhetorical deltas.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags no missing citations and does not audit every load-bearing citation.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks uncertainty for several claims (e.g., variance bound, regret statement) and identifies areas where the authors need to provide more context or justification.",
    "RX.3": "The agent stays within scope and addresses all requested dimensions.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies potential issues with the output (e.g., correlated judge errors, adversarial responses) but does not introduce new errors or harmful content.",
    "RX.5": "The agent provides some annotations for non-cosmetic changes (e.g., reorganization of sections) but does not provide a complete provenance trail."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies one prior work (Hartmann & Liu 2021) and articulates the delta, but does not map against multiple works or identify sharp vs rhetorical deltas.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags no missing citations and does not audit every load-bearing citation.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks uncertainty for several claims (e.g., variance bound, regret statement) and identifies areas where the authors need to provide more context or justification.
rationale.RX.3: The agent stays within scope and addresses all requested dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies potential issues with the output (e.g., correlated judge errors, adversarial responses) but does not introduce new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provides some annotations for non-cosmetic changes (e.g., reorganization of sections) but does not provide a complete provenance trail.
